sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17171" key="a)trapi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀτρᾰπ-ίζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀτραπός</etym>) <sense id="n17171.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">go through, traverse,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰς ἁρμονίας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
